# Gel Permeation Chromatography

**Summary**: A chromatography technique used to determine the average molecular weights and polydispersity of polymers.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-abdallah|Abdallah, 2024]] used GPC to determine the average molecular weights of polymers exposed to different breakers.
